name: Meddling
text: 1. Forced: After you reveal a treachery, raise your threat by 2. 2. Forced: After you reveal a location, exhaust the character you control with the highest [attack]. 3. Forced: After you reveal an enemy, discard an ally you control. 4. Forced: The first encounter card you reveal each round gains surge. Forced: When you would increase your Meddling, raise your threat by 1 instead.

name: Meddling Cover Card
text: During the staging step, instead of the first player revealing all encounter cards, each player reveals 1 encounter card in turn order. Forced: After questing successfully, incrrease your Meddling by 1. Refresh Action: Exhaust allies and/or Pipe attachments with a combined printed cost of X decrease your Meddling by 1 (to a minimum of 1). X is your current Meddling value.

name: Golasgil
text: Each hero you control gains the Outlands trait. Forced: At the end of the round, if you control 6 or more non-unique Outlands allies, shuffle them into your deck until you control 5 or fewer.

name: Edrahil
text: Edrahil cannot be chosen as your starting hero unless your deck contains at least 50 non-event cards. Response: After you play an event, draw 1 card. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Faithful Servant
text: Action: Put a Servant card into play from your hand or discard pile and draw 1 card.

name: Urgent News
text: Action: Draw 1 card for each hero you control with the Scout trait.

name: Mirlonde
text: While the victory display contains at least 1 enemy, location, and treachery card, Mirlonde loses the ally card type and gains the hero card type. Response: After an encounter card is added to the victory display, ready Mirlonde.

name: Student of Warfare
text: While Student of Warfare has 3 attack tokens on it, it loses the Servant trait and gains the Warrior trait instead. Response: After you exhaust a Warrior character, place 1 attack token on Student of Warfare (to a maximum of 3).

name: Mono Tactics Support
text: Cannot be played or enter play unless you control at least 3 [tactics] heroes with no matching printed Traits. Attach to a hero. Action: Exhaust Mono Tactics Support and a character with at least 3 [attack]. Then, choose 1: reduce your threat by 1, draw 1 card, or add 1 resource to the pool of a hero you control.

name: Mono Lore Support
text: Cannot be played or enter play unless you control at least 3 [lore] heroes with no matching printed Traits. Attach to a hero. Action: Exhaust Mono Lore Support and discard a card from your hand. Then, choose 1: reduce your threat by 1, deal 2 damage to an enemy engaged with you, or add 1 resource to the pool of a hero you control.

name: Mono Spirit Support
text: Cannot be played or enter play unless you control at least 3 [spirit] heroes with no matching printed Traits. Attach to a hero. Action: Exhaust Mono Spirit Support and raise your threat by 1. Then, draw 1 card, deal 2 damage to an enemy engaged with you, or add 1 resource to the pool of a hero you control.

name: Mono Leadership Support
text: Cannot be played or enter play unless you control at least 3 [leadership] heroes with no matching printed Traits. Attach to a hero. Action: Exhaust Mono Leadership Support and spend 1 resource. Then, draw 1 card, deal 2 damage to an enemy engaged with you, or reduce your threat by 1.

name: Placeholder Objective 6
text: Play into the staging area. Planning Action: Attach an ally in your hand facedown to an ally you control that shares a Trait. Counts as a restricted Condition attachment with the text: “Attached ally gets +1 hit point.”

name: AP6
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: Any non-unique Wraith card will be set aside to form its own separate encounter deck with its own respective discard pile. Players do not reveal encounter cards from the Wraith deck during the quest phase. Instead, when quest 3B prompts players to reveal a Wraith card players will reveal a card from the Wraith encounter deck. The Wraith World is considered its own separate play area.

name: AP6
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper

name: Old Forest Rituals
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: Setup: Set all copies of Gaur, the Magical Lantern, and the Wraith cards aside, out of play. Add Grey Lady Poplar and Ritual Site to the staging area. Discard cards until 1[pp] Creature enemies are discarded and add them to the staging area. Shuffle the discard pile back into the encounter deck.

name: Old Forest Rituals
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: At the end of the round, raise your threat by 1. Players cannot reduce their threat.

name: Perilous Night
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: When Revealed: Add Gaur the Burned to the staging area. Discard cards from the encounter deck until 1 PP Wolf-cult is discarded and add them to the staging area. Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck.

name: Perilous Night
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: Time 5: When the last time counter is removed, the players lose the game. Gaur cannot take damage unless Ritual Site is the active location. Once Ritual Site becomes the active location it cannot leave play as an explored location unless Gaur the Burned has been defeated. Forced: Once Ritual Site leaves play as an explored location flip Grey Lady Poplar over and progress to Stage 3A.

name: Into the Twilight Realm
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: When Revealed: If a player’s threat is above their starting threat, they must reset their threat dial to their starting threat. Remove Gaur the Burned from the Victory Display, flip him, and add him to the staging area. Search the Enounter Deck, Discard Pile, and Victory Display for Altar to Draugluin and make it the active location. Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck and discard cards until 2 plus 1 PP Wolf-cult are discarded and add them to the staging area. Set up “Wraith World” area per rules insert.

name: Into the Twilight Realm
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: When any player would reduce their threat by any amount, reduce that amount to 1. Whenever a Wolf-cult enemy is destroyed reveal 1 Wraith World card. Whenever an Altar location leaves play reveal 2 Wraith World cards. At the end of the round, if either Gaur is at 0 health and both versions are not in the Victory Display he regenerates 1 PP health. Players win the game if Gaur the Immortal and Gaur the Wraith are both in the Victory Display during the same round.

name: Altar to Draugluin
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: Forced: If Altar to Draugluin is in the staging area at the end of the Travel Phase deal 1 damage to a Wolf-cult enemy in play. Forced: When Altar to Draugluin leaves play, deal 1 damage to each Wolf-cult enemy in play.
shadow: Shadow: Deal 1 damage to a charater you control and deal 2 damage to a non-unique Wolf-cult enemy in play.

name: Forest Clearing
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: Travel: The highest engagement cost non-unique Creature enemy engages the first player and makes an immediate attack, if able. While Forest Clearing is in the staging area Gaur gets +2 def.
shadow: Shadow: If attacking enemy is a Creature, it moves to the next player and makes an additional attack, if able.

name: Corrupted Woods
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: While Corrupted Woods is in the staging area all Wolf-cult enemies get +1 atk (this effect does not stack with other copies of Corrupted Woods). Travel: The First player must exhaust a character they control, if able.

name: Acolyte of Carcharoth
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: While Acolyte of Carcharoth is in play, Gaur gets +1 atk. If there are 3 copies of Acolyte of Carcharoth in play, Gaur makes an additional attack during the Combat Phase.
shadow: Shadow: Attacking enemy gets +1 atk (+2 atk if they are Wolf-cult).

name: Red Maw Zealot
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: Forced: After Red Maw Zealot attacks deal it a damage. If there are 3 copies of Red Maw Zealot in play, Guar cannot take damage.
shadow: Shadow: Add Red Maw Zealot to the staging area.

name: Jaws of Thirst
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: When Revealed: Gaur makes an immediate attack agaust the first player, if able.
shadow: Shadow: If the attacking enemy is Gaur, he makes an additional attack.

name: Echoes of Tol-in-Gaurhoth
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: When Revealed: Attach to the highest threat location in the staging area. Counts as a Condition attachment with the text: If attached location is in the staging area at the end of the travel phase, deal 1 damage to a Wolf-cult enemy in play.

name: Grey Lady Poplar
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: Immune to player card effects. While Grey Lady Poplar is in the staging area each hero gets +1WP.

name: Rift Between Worlds
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: Cannot leave the staging area. Immune to player card effects. At the end of the round, a player may raise their threat by 1 or remove 3 progress from the main quest to choose up to two characters they control and send them through the rift in either direction. Each player may trigger this option once per round.

name: Gaur the Burned
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: Cannot leave the staging area. Considered to be engaged with the First Player. X is 3 plus the number of Wolf-cult enemies in play. When Gaur the Burned attacks you, choose: either discard an attachment you control, or raise your threat by 3.

name: Gaur the Immortal
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: Cannot leave the staging area. Immune to player card effects. Considered to be engaged with the First Player. X is 3 plus the number of Wolf-cult enemies in play. When Gaur attacks you, choose: either discard an attachment you control, or raise your threat by 2. At the end of the round, if there are less than 1[pp] Wolf-cult enemies in play discard cards from the encounter deck until 1 PP are discarded and add them to the staging area.

name: Gaur the Wraith
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: Cannot leave the staging area. Considered to be engaged with each Player. Players defend against and attack Gaur the Wraith with [willpower]. Deal all enemies in the Wraith World an additional shadow card.

name: Dreadful Fea of Sauron
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: When Revealed: Each character in the wraith world gets –1 WP until the end of the round.

name: The Unseen Realm
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: When Revealed: Each player must switch a ready character from each world, if able, and exhaust them.

name: Cursed Spirit
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: While engaged with a player that player cannot reduce their threat. When defending against or attacking Cursed Spirit, players must use their [willpower].

name: Not of This World
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: When Revealed: Deal 1 PP damage among characters the players control in the Wraith World.

name: Flesh and Bone
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: When Revealed: Each player deals X damage either among characters they control or Wolf-cult enemies in play, where X is the number of enemies in play.
shadow: Shadow: Deal 1 damage to two different Wolf-cult enemies in play, if able.

name: Ritual Site
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: X is equal to 1 PP. Immune to player card effects. The players cannot travel here unless there are at least 4 PP progress tokens on stage 2B. Travel: For each hero a player controls, that player must either: raise their threat by 1 or discard a resource from that hero.

name: Magical Lantern
encounterSet: ALeP - QA2.9 Salted Pork + Palantir Record Keeper
text: MacGuffin from Q8! Will be used to open the rift between worlds and give access to the Wraith World.
